title: plantago australis subsp. australis
intro: Plantago australis subsp. australis, also known as the Austral Plains Plantain, is a perennial plant species in the Plantaginaceae family. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and diuretic effects. The health benefits of Plantago australis subsp. australis include the treatment of wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves can be dried and made into teas, tinctures, or infusions to utilize its medicinal properties.
